title: rhus oxyacantha var. ziziphina
intro: Rhus oxyacantha var. ziziphina, also known as Ziziphus jujuba var. ziziphina, is a plant species within the Rhamnaceae family, commonly referred to as the jujube or red date. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhus oxyacantha var. ziziphina include improving digestion, reducing stress, and boosting the immune system, as well as having potential effects on cognitive function and cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Rhus oxyacantha var. ziziphina is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being consumed as a fruit or used in traditional Chinese medicine.
